column1: # MathSolver acceptance battery — see README.md in this directory for conventions.
# ---------- simplification rules and guard cases (DESIGN.md section 7) ----------
# guard: log expansion is out of scope for simplify — these must NOT change
# guard: asin(sin(x)) is NOT value-preserving and must stay put
# guard: x^a * y^a must NOT be combined (not safe for arbitrary a)
# guard: sqrt(x)*sqrt(y) must NOT become sqrt(x*y)
# guard: irrational roots stay symbolic, never decimal-approximated
# guards: no rational roots / not factorable — must come back unchanged

column6: bounds must evaluate to finite numbers

column1: # irrational-root quadratic: roots 1 +- sqrt(2) must stay symbolic (contain a sqrt)
# symbolic discriminant: roots reported with sqrt(b^2 - 4) and a warning
# unbound symbol: EvalError names the missing symbol, exit 1, message on stderr
# malformed assignment (no '=') is a usage error, exit 2
# variable inferred (single free symbol); ambiguity is a usage error, exit 2

column6: cannot infer the variable for collect

column1: # exact rational arithmetic is 64-bit overflow-checked: folding 2^200 must throw, not wrap
# usage errors exit 2: --range missing its HI argument; malformed eval binding

column6: system is not linear in the requested variables
